message:
test: add security validation tests for GitHub URLs and tombstone IDs

- Add tests for is_github_url() to verify it accepts valid GitHub domains
  and rejects non-GitHub URLs (including subdomain attacks)
- Add tests for TombstoneManager to verify path traversal and injection
  attacks are properly rejected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
